sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this rail shooter

special_mechanics.name: Pseudo-3D Scrolling
special_mechanics.description: Rail shooter gameplay with Space Harrier-style pseudo-3D perspective. Various levels scroll 'into the screen' vertically, horizontally, or diagonally. Player controls character movement across the screen with sprite-scaling visuals.

special_mechanics.name: Weapon Upgrade System
special_mechanics.description: Cotton can upgrade her weapon to higher levels as the player progresses through the game.

special_mechanics.name: Magic Spell Casting
special_mechanics.description: Player can cast magical spells by collecting special items during gameplay.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Rail shooter with no documented movement physics parameters. Wikipedia source provides only gameplay mechanics and design overview, no quantified physics values. Game is primarily a pseudo-3D rail shooter (Space Harrier style) rather than a platformer, so traditional movement physics are not primary design elements.
